purpose: Consolidated source file for the live MAMBO demo vocabulary before regenerating the production terms-xls-clean-*.json files.

schema.category: Formátum | Fűzésmód | Kötésmód | Borítószerkezet | Gerincszerkezet | Anyag | Záródás | Tárolóelem

mergeRules: Keep existing live normalized keys as the production schema.
Prefer draft-material-vocabulary terms for updated cover and material vocabularies.
Keep enriched live usage/meaning fields for storage terms where they already exist.
Do not expose top category tiles for Anyag and Borítószerkezet until dedicated category icons are ready.
After review, regenerate terms-xls-clean-1.json through terms-xls-clean-4.json from this master instead of editing them manually.
